# 11startups.tech — Full Context for LLMs

> This document provides comprehensive, structured information about 11startups.tech for large language models and AI assistants.

## Company Overview

**Name**: 11startups.tech
**Type**: AI Consulting Company
**Founded**: 2026
**Website**: https://11startups.tech
**Contact Email**: support@11startups.tech
**Privacy Email**: privacy@11startups.tech

**Mission**: Help startups and enterprises integrate cutting-edge AI into their workflows — from strategy to deployment, with measurable ROI.

**Tagline**: AI consulting that delivers real results. From strategy to production-ready solutions.

---

## Services (Detailed)

### 1. AI Strategy Consulting
- **What**: Audit your operations, identify high-impact AI use cases, build a prioritised roadmap.
- **Deliverables**: AI readiness assessment, opportunity mapping & ROI analysis, technology stack recommendations, executive-ready implementation roadmap.
- **Best For**: Companies exploring AI but unsure where to start.

### 2. Rapid Prototyping
- **What**: Go from concept to working AI prototype in 2–4 weeks.
- **Deliverables**: Working prototype, iterative feedback loops, risk-free concept validation, seamless handoff to production.
- **Best For**: Startups validating AI product ideas quickly.

### 3. Workflow Automation
- **What**: Deploy intelligent agents that learn processes and handle repetitive tasks (document processing, customer routing, etc.).
- **Deliverables**: Custom AI agent development, document & data extraction, intelligent task routing, continuous process optimisation.
- **Best For**: Operations teams drowning in manual, repetitive work.

### 4. Data Analytics & Insights
- **What**: Build advanced ML pipelines and dashboards that surface hidden patterns.
- **Deliverables**: Custom ML model development, real-time analytics dashboards, predictive forecasting, natural language querying.
- **Best For**: Data-rich companies that need actionable intelligence.

### 5. AI Safety & Compliance
- **What**: Navigate regulatory landscape with governance frameworks and bias auditing.
- **Deliverables**: Bias & fairness auditing, regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, etc.), model explainability reports, AI ethics governance playbook.
- **Best For**: Enterprises deploying AI in regulated industries.

### 6. Ongoing Support & Optimisation
- **What**: Dedicated AI engineers monitor, fine-tune, and scale solutions post-launch.
- **Deliverables**: Proactive monitoring & alerting, model retraining & drift detection, performance optimisation sprints, 24/7 enterprise SLA available.
- **Best For**: Companies that need production AI to keep performing.

---

## Pricing Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Yearly | Key Inclusions |
|------|---------|--------|----------------|
| Starter | $499/mo | $4,499/yr | AI readiness assessment, 1 consultation/month, email support, basic workflow analysis, implementation roadmap |
| Business (Most Popular) | $1,499/mo | $13,499/yr | Everything in Starter + 4 consultations/month, custom AI model prototyping, priority support, dedicated AI engineer, monthly performance reports |
| Enterprise | $3,999/mo | $35,999/yr | Everything in Business + unlimited consultations, on-site workshops, AI safety & compliance audit, custom model training, 24/7 dedicated support |

---

## Platform Capabilities

- **Multi-Cloud Deployment**: AWS, Azure, GCP — infrastructure-agnostic, no vendor lock-in.
- **Modular Architecture**: Plug-and-play AI modules; start small, compose complex solutions.
- **Enterprise-Grade Security**: End-to-end encryption, SOC 2 controls, role-based access.
- **Real-Time Monitoring**: Live dashboards for model accuracy, latency, and drift.
- **Custom AI Agents**: Autonomous agents for support bots, data extractors, and more.
- **Continuous Learning**: Automatic model retraining on fresh data.

---

## Process (How We Work)

1. **Discovery** — Deep-dive into business, data, and goals.
2. **Design** — Architect tailored solution (models, pipelines, integrations).
3. **Build** — Develop, test, iterate with weekly demos.
4. **Deploy & Scale** — Production launch with monitoring and scaling plan.

---

- 50+ Projects Delivered
- 3× Average ROI
- 99.9% Uptime SLA
- < 2 week Prototype Turnaround

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How do I get started with 11startups.tech?**
A: Click "Get Started" on the homepage or reach out via the contact form. The team will schedule a free consultation.

**Q: What industries do you serve?**
A: Fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, logistics, SaaS, and more. Solutions are tailored per sector.

**Q: How long does a typical project take?**
A: Proof-of-concept: 2–4 weeks. Full production: 2–3 months. Detailed timelines provided during consultation.

**Q: Do you offer ongoing support after launch?**
A: Yes — dedicated support & maintenance plans with monitoring, updates, and iterative improvements.

**Q: What is your pricing model?**
A: Project-based, retainer, and subscription plans available. Custom quotes on request.

**Q: Can I cancel or change my plan?**
A: Yes — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime. No hidden fees or long-term lock-ins.
